quote:
In the hush of dawn, a single fear can shadow a kingdom louder than a hundred drums.

When the light of majority flickers, even the most steadfast eavesdroppers may lose their way.

A guardian meant to shield the child must first mend the cracks within his own heart.

The river of wealth will swell when oil soars, but it will also carry the weight of the world's quiet downturns.

Between earthly rests and skyward hopes, true peace grows where we honor the lives in graves with gentle remembrance.

A seat once warmed by fervor may fall mute when the spirit that sang within it has ceased to breathe.

When the tongue of a free nation holds its breath, the audience will learn that silence can silence the voice.
quote_preview: In the hush of dawn, a single fear can shadow a kingdom louder than a hundred drums.
